Join Our Team

Be a part of the amazing work we do at Presentation Manor

Why Choose to Work at Presentation Manor?

At Presentation Manor, we're all about creating a positive environment to enhance the lives of our residents, their families, and our employees. We’ve developed a culturally diverse workplace that empowers our team to demonstrate their talents and skills each day. We are looking for motivated and passionate individuals like you to be a part of the amazing work we do.

│Career Opportunities

Explore our current job openings and find the role that suits you best. We offer opportunities in various departments, each contributing to the vibrant community at Presentation Manor.

If you would like to submit your resume, please send it to this email: hr@presentationmanor.com

Ready to Make a Difference?

Join our dynamic team and contribute to making a positive impact in the lives of our residents. We offer a variety of career opportunities in nursing, culinary, recreation, and more. Discover the benefits of working in a place where your skills are appreciated, and your growth is supported.

CONTACT US
